title: Job Opening Teacher at NASSCOM Foundation

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at NASSCOM Foundation
jsonLd.description:
Join the NASSCOM Foundation family as a Teacher in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NASSCOM Foundation:
NASSCOM Foundation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NASSCOM Foundation!
